title: mezleria dregeana
intro: Mezleria dregeana, also known as the bushy tailed daisy, is a flowering plant that belongs to the Asteraceae family. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Mezleria dregeana include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Mezleria dregeana is often prepared as an herbal tea or infused oil, which can be used to treat various ailments, including fever, cough, and skin conditions.
